summary: Mission v10.4 - Persistance du Chat et Alignement Dashboard - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Fallback robuste msg.content || msg.text || msg.body || '' implemented at ChatWidget.js L329, (2) Header icons gap 16px verified (gap-4 class), (3) Chat opens correctly with form (Prénom, WhatsApp, Email), (4) localStorage keys af_chat_client/afroboost_identity defined at L42-44, (5) /api/partners/active returns 5 partners, (6) Like button counter 0→1 working, (7) Bouton Retour with gradient violet at L4298-4312, (8) Close button (×) on reservation summary at L407-437.
